title: Security: Pdfium heap-buffer-overflow in downsample_3_2()
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Pdfium heap buffer overflow read in downsample_3_2 at third_party\skia\src\core\SkMipmap.cpp:331:8.  
  
In function CPDF_DIB::CreateDecoder at core/fpdfapi/page/cpdf_dib.cpp:517:5, the program allocates a bitmap buffer when creating JBIG2Decoder.  
  
```cpp  
  i
